settings.text: Choti batches, zyada dhyaan, behtar swaad.

settings.copy: Dadi ke haathon ka parampara aur maa ke pyaar ka swaad.

settings.quote: “Aam ka achar bilkul ghar jaisa swad. Quality aur packaging dono hi best!”
settings.author: Priya Sharma

settings.quote: “Nimbu ka achar try kiya, bahut hi tasty aur fresh. Will order again!”
settings.author: Rohit Verma

settings.quote: “Best achar I have ever had. 100% recommended!”
settings.author: Neha Agarwal

settings.quote: “Mirch ka achar bilkul nani ke haath jaisa. Pure oil aur masale — no compromise!”
settings.author: Ananya Gupta

settings.quote: “Mixed pickle is our family favourite now. Fresh, tangy, and arrives packed with care.”
settings.author: Vikram Singh

settings.quote: “Ordered for my parents — they said it tastes just like homemade. Instant repurchase!”
settings.author: Meera Kapoor
